Short title and com m encem ent—( J ) These rules may be called the Cinem atograph (Certification) (amendment) Rules, 1995 (2) They shall come into force with effect from 1-5-95. 2. In the C in em ato p ap h (Certification) R ules, 1983,— (1) in rule 22, after sub-rule (5),the following sub-rule shall be inserted, namely "(3A) N othing m sub-rules (4J and (5) shall aff'cct the disclosure o f names o f persons in the certificate granted by the Board'. (2) in rule 35, in sub-rule (1), after the word s and letter “o r 'S ’ the following words and letters shall bo substituted, ^'namely “o r ‘V/U* or ‘V/A* or ‘V /U A ’ or ‘V.'S’ ' (3) in rule 35, for the sub-rule (3) and the Table thereunder, the following shall be substituted', namely :— “(3) The prescribed m ark o f the Board shall be a film copy o f the certificate, th at is a trailer certificate, which shall be affixed to the film and always exhibited with it. The trailer certificate shall be for such duration as one can read it on the screen: Provided that Part I o f the certificate shall be shown for a minim um duraiion o f 10 seconds. . Provided further that if there are no excisions or modifications ordered by the Board, P art U o f the certificate need n o t be shown.” (4j in the Second Schedule, for the Form s IV, IV-A, V, V-A, VI, VI-A, VII and V ll-A , the following forms shall be subs tituted namely FO RM IV [See rule 35(1) G O V ERN M EN T O F IN D IA CEN TRA L BOARD OF FILM CERTIFICA TIO N .
